title: Forgotten Fey
description: Adds Fey Creatures to the game
body:
This Minecraft D&D mod is perfect for players who want to add more goblins and fey to their game. With this mod, you can encounter a variety of creatures, including mischievous goblins and elusive fey. These creatures are not only visually stunning, but they also add a new level of excitement and challenge to your gameplay.

 

The mod allows players to explore new areas and encounter unique creatures that they wouldn't normally find in the vanilla Minecraft game. With the addition of these mythical beings, players can create their own D&D-style adventures, where they must face off against dangerous creatures to complete quests and earn rewards.

 

Whether you're a seasoned Minecraft player or new to the game, this mod is sure to provide you with hours of fun and adventure. So why not give it a try and see what goblins and fey you can discover in your Minecraft world?


Requires Forgotten Mobs and Geckolib 1.19 - 3.1.40

Requires https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dnd-forgotten-mobs
